title: VerifyTrade: Binance Futures PnL
description: Notarize your Binance Futures realized PnL for the VerifyTrade leaderboard

steps.title: Open Binance Trade History
steps.description: Log in and open the Futures Trade History page. The page fires a bapi request we'll intercept.

steps.title: Collect session credentials
steps.description: We capture your session cookie + csrftoken + device fingerprint so we can re-issue the same authenticated request through the verifier.

steps.title: Notarize trades
steps.description: TLSNotary will run an MPC-TLS / Proxy-mode session against www.binance.com via the configured verifier, producing a presentation of your Futures trade history.
